name: Bangkok Dusit Medical Services Public Company Limited
summary: Bangkok Dusit Medical Services Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, operates hospitals. The company owns and manages 6 hospital groups, including Bangkok Hospital Group, Samitivej Hospital Group, BNH Hospital, Phyathai Hospital Group, Paolo Hospital Group, and Royal Hospital Group. It operates regenerative and preventive wellness clinics. In addition, the company operates hotels and restaurant; sells health foods; provides accounting, health insurance, laboratory services, investment, information technology, training, insurance brokerage, air medical transportation, and property management services, as well as asset management services; and manufactures and distributes medicine and pharmaceutical products. Further, it is involved in the e-commerce business. As of December 31, 2020, the company operates 49 hospitals in Thailand and Cambodia. Bangkok Dusit Medical Services Public Company Limited was incorporated in 1969 and is based in Bangkok, Thailand.
